diagnostic_tree: Xac dinh loai van ban/chi phi
Tim kiem rui ro (Loophole/Bat thuong an)
De xuat chinh sua chinh xac tung cau chu
Yeu cau Trace Logs / Grafana Metrics thay vi doan mo
Co lap khu vuc: Network -> RAM/CPU -> IOPS Dia -> Code
Dua ra lenh chuan doan (Profiling Tools)

server_outage_or_slow.expert_action: Bypass code logic, check infrastructure metrics first.

hardware_iot_malfunction.expert_action: Review physical wiring schematic and power delivery before reviewing C++ code.

hidden_causes: Ambiguous phrasing leading to legal loopholes
contract_document_creation.expert_action: Enforce strict standardized legal templates. Flag absolute words (e.g., 'must', 'always').
